allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\(''dependencies'',{}\), **p.get\(''devDependencies'',{}\)}; print\(''\\n''.join\(f''{k}: {v}'' for k,v in sorted\(deps.items\(\)\) if any\(x in k for x in [''svg'',''lucide'',''expo'']\)\)\)")

Bash(py -3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(open\(''package.json''\)\); deps={**p.get\(''dependencies'',{}\), **p.get\(''devDependencies'',{}\)}; print\(''\\n''.join\(f''{k}: {v}'' for k,v in sorted\(deps.items\(\)\) if any\(x in k for x in [''svg'',''lucide'',''expo'']\)\)\)")

Bash(py -c "import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET; zf = zipfile.ZipFile\(''c:/Users/יואב רובין/.claude/projects/finpl/docs/אפיון פלואו משתמש לאפליקציית FinPlay \(2\).docx''\); content = zf.open\(''word/document.xml''\).read\(\).decode\(''utf-8''\); tree = ET.fromstring\(content\); ns = {''w'': ''http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main''}; texts = [''''.join\([t.text for t in p.findall\(''.//w:t'', ns\) if t.text]\) for p in tree.findall\(''.//w:p'', ns\)]; print\(''\\n''.join\([t for t in texts if t]\)\)")
Bash(for dir in auth arena chat economy finfeed lessons onboarding profile pyramid shop simulator)
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where ProcessId=37052 get Name,CommandLine 2>&1")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d[0], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")

PowerShell(function Convert-Sha1ToKeyHash\([string]$sha1\) { $bytes = $sha1 -split ':' | ForEach-Object { [Convert]::ToByte\($_, 16\) }; [Convert]::ToBase64String\($bytes\) }; "App signing key:  $\(Convert-Sha1ToKeyHash '48:0A:4A:E5:36:DD:CE:9D:F9:46:13:D1:85:F2:05:78:75:BD:27:7F'\)"; "Upload key:       $\(Convert-Sha1ToKeyHash '62:13:F5:56:CE:9D:F0:E0:6F:4C:C8:4D:E0:6B:A9:24:A8:8E:BF:9A'\)")
